title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Perospero, Big Mom as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This page is one of my favorites...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A real live Unicorn! It's a beauty, ain't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: NEEEIGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: close... but more importantly,

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: It's alive... inside the book!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ones kept in this book will never age.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But of course! The contents of a book don't just change every time you open it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Help...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This library is filled with books like this that keep all kinds of rare creatures tucked away safely.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Help...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the ability of Mont D'Or, one of my very own children!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GROWL...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Anyone assume

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My most recent additions to the collection include a centaur from punk hazard...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, and I was wondering if I had a chance to get a little bit of a little bit of a little bit of a little bit of money, I would have to say that I was going to be a little more fun.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And even something as cool as this! A hybrid of a longarm and longleg human...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and a griffin that was found in the South Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Let me out, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: known as a "longlimb human!"**

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Help!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She's even got humans in those things!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Big mom, ever since entering this country,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We've witnessed an incredible level of diversity.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, of course! That's what my ultimate goal...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: for Totto Land I-...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, there is one race in particular that I have yet to witness in this land. I feel like it would be hard to miss them if they were around...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm talking about the giants!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For a country that boasts a population that includes every possible race out there, I've yet to see a single giant around...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: oversized humans are the closest I've seen so f...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Really? Well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You probably just missed 'em.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: M... M-M-MAMA! W-W-W-WE'E... Brought the T-T-two you've asked for!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Alright, well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, today is quite a busy day for me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd have loved to spend more time with you all in this beautiful weather, but I must go now, so have a lovely rest of the day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Sorry, I'm just a bit nervous...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "Germa 66"... They just look so cool...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Especially Lord Ichiji and Lady Reiji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pipe down... you're a real idiot, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're letting fiction influence you way too much!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's on the outside doesn't matter in the end.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Within the whole cake chateau: the prisoner library.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shit, I lost the page!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Flip Flip...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where did I put 'em again?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh! I love how bad these kids look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Uckety >

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's with this room?! Let me out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where is my shower room?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm drenched in Mizuame and it's pissing me off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aha.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kukuki! how sweet! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Perospero
dialogue.text: A little candy girl!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Here comes Mama!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 57 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
